# snapgrab
> URL to screenshot + metadata. Claude Vision optimized. CLI / async Python / MCP.
## Install
```
pip install snapgrab        # core
pip install snapgrab[mcp]   # + MCP server
playwright install chromium
```
## Features
Screenshot capture (PNG/JPEG/PDF), viewport presets (desktop/tablet/mobile/custom), Claude Vision auto-resize (1568px max + token estimation), metadata extraction (title/OG/favicon/status), element capture via CSS selector, multi-viewport comparison, dark mode, lazy-load handling.
## Exports
`from snapgrab import capture` — async, returns `CaptureResult` with `.path`, `.vision_tokens`, `.metadata`
## Example
```python
from snapgrab import capture
result = await capture("https://example.com", viewport="mobile", full_page=True)
print(result.path, result.vision_tokens, result.metadata.title)
```
## Links
- [Full API](/llms-full.txt) | [GitHub](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/snapgrab) | [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/snapgrab/)
